title: covellia radiata
intro: Covellia radiata, also known as the "creeping covellia" or "creeping jewel flower", is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Covellia radiata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Covellia radiata is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
